name: gmap-place-saver
description: Resolve a place from a social/maps URL or text and save it to the correct regional Google Maps saved list. MCP server + CLI.
author: louiskyee

scripts.check: node --check src/resolve/social.js && node --check src/resolve/candidate.js && node --check src/resolve/wrapper.js && node --check src/maps/save.js && node --check src/maps/note.js && node --check src/recommendation.js && node --check src/storage/sidecar.js && node --check src/index.js && node --check src/smoke.js && node --check bin/gmap-place.js && node --check mcp/server.js && node --check scripts/login.js && bash -n scripts/login-server.sh
scripts.smoke:candidate: PLACE_QUERY='彰化縣北斗鎮七星里民族路82號 小熊菓子 新北斗店' node src/resolve/candidate.js
